ddls:
CREATE TABLE "religious_affiliations" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for the recorded statistics */,
  "evangelical_lutheran" TEXT /* Percentage of the population affiliated with the Evangelical Lutheran Church of Finland */,
  "finnish_orthodox" TEXT /* Percentage of the population affiliated with the Finnish Orthodox Church */,
  "other_religions" TEXT /* Percentage of the population affiliated with other religions */,
  "not_affiliated" TEXT /* Percentage of the population not affiliated with any religion */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store age distribution data for each religious group */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store gender distribution data for each religious group */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store geographical distribution data for each religious group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* The year for which data is recorded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religions" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the religion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the religion */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Founding year of the religion */,
  "leaders" TEXT /* Key leaders or figures associated with the religion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_religions" (
  "other_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the other religion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the other religion */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Founding year of the other religion (if applicable) */,
  "leaders" TEXT /* Key leaders or figures associated with the other religion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the statistic */,
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the religion */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the population affiliated with the religion */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store age distribution data for the specific religion and year */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store gender distribution data for the specific religion and year */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store geographical distribution data for the specific religion and year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_religion_id FOREIGN KEY ("religion_id") REFERENCES religions ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the report covers */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
